ue\",\"old\":\"False\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    total_steps = max(int(total_steps), 1)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed step budget more effectively with cosine decay tied to the actual verifier horizon, while pairing it with a stronger AdamW configuration that should converge faster in 256 steps on this compact CNN.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
